items.title: 5 Reddit outreach drafts ready
items.context: Tier-2 leads in r/Nightmares, r/LucidDreaming, r/Jung, r/Dreams. Drafts include Tri-Spine interpretations ready to post.
blockedBy: Reddit API access approval pending (submitted 2026-02-09 16:20 UTC). After approval: Client ID + Secret needed for automated posting
items.notes: Orion drafted 5 responses. Manual posting possible now (browse to reddit.com), but automated access blocked. P1 because Reddit is our primary acquisition channel and timing matters for visibility.

items.title: Reddit Intelligence monitoring approved
items.context: Nova has set up monitoring on 4 subreddits with pain-point keyword tracking. Ready to activate.
blockedBy: Nova needs guardrails on how often to search (rate limits)
items.notes: Nova's Reddit Intelligence is ready but needs timing protocol to avoid Brave Search rate limits (1 req/min). Recommend every-6-hour cron.

items.title: Automated health check system deployed
items.context: Cron jobs running every 6h with retry logic and proper Slack routing.
items.notes: Auto-recovery + structured logging implemented. No action needed — FYI only.

items.title: Brand voice inclusivity update
items.context: Removed fortune-teller positioning, added spiritual/psychology bridge language.
items.notes: Key phrases: 'Dreams aren't prophetic — they're personal.' Already approved via Slack conversation.
